title: BuilderPacket
description: District output: proposed obligations and risk assessment. Non-sovereign, never directly consumed by Mayor.

packet_id.description: Stable identifier for this packet (uuid or content hash).

run_id.description: Links this packet to a specific governance run.

claim_id.description: Links this packet to a specific claim.

district_version.description: SemVer for the district concierge logic that produced this packet.

inputs_digest.description: Optional sha256 digest of canonicalized inputs (claim + context) used by the district.

ttl_seconds.description: Optional time-to-live for this packet; stale packets should be rejected by Concierge.

risks.description: Non-sovereign risk notes; do not influence Mayor directly. For UX/telemetry only.

proposed_obligations.description: Obligations this district proposes for inclusion in the briefcase.

notes.description: Optional district narrative; never consumed by Mayor. For UX/debug only.

confidence.description: Optional district confidence score. NEVER used in decision logic. For UX/telemetry only.

type.description: Type of obligation determines expected evidence format.

severity.description: HARD obligations block SHIP if unsatisfied. SOFT are advisory only.

expected_attestor.description: Entity expected to produce attestation for this obligation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this obligation requires.
